introduction: SYNOPSISHwang Geum-bo is a man who possesses superhuman physical powers. He meets and falls in love with Emma on the streets. Wherever these two go, trouble is sure to follow. Hwang proposes to Emma to leave Korea for Japan. But she insists that she must wait for her husband to return and so Hwang boards the plane for Japan alone. But the plane ends up exploding near Mt. Fuji and Hwang is the sole survivor. A Japanese woman nurses him back to health and soon he is enjoying himself with a bevy of Japanese women. Meanwhile Emma is desperately trying to meet Hwang and soon she heads for Japan to find him. After overcoming numerous obstacles, they are reunited. Together in a foreign land, they devise a scheme to cheat a lustful villager out of a great amount of money. Although they succeed in pulling it off, Hwang wastes it away with his old lifestyle, leading disorderly life and gambling. Now they are back to square one and the only means of survival is Emma's prostitution.故事黄金时代是一个超乎寻常的人的超凡力量。有一天，他碰巧在路上遇到一匹马。然而，他们两个是不寻常的，因为一些非凡的东西。她告诉她的室友，金童会逃到日本，但因为要等丈夫，所以只有金童乘飞机去日本。但飞机是意外的看到的唯一的幸存者被炸毁附近的金富士山空气再次找到力量来阐述护理日本女人那里，花好时间与几个日本女人。另一方面，首尔的室友正在忘记金弓，最后在日本看到他，并在曲折的末期与他结束。这地方不是靠两个人奇怪的打算只是chaenggiji了大量的资金和计划的方法，以一个村庄的色狼，这也失去了对淫乱生活中所有的钱，包括赌博看而黄金是生活罗威是手到口的palmyeo自己卑微的生命是的。
